scripts.build: [ -d dist ] && rm -r dist; bun build --target=node --format=esm --packages external src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.pretest:types: bun run build && find test -name '*.test-d.ts' -exec perl -pi -e 's|// \@ts-expect-error|// ts-expect-error|g' {} +
